title: A fresh app icon and gentle overdue reminders

blocks.text: This update brings a redesigned app icon and gentle overdue reminders.

items: A redesigned app icon and logo, three stacked cards in Teiki's red, yellow, and green that echo the app's card-based design.
If a bill is still unpaid a few days after it is due, Teiki now sends one gentle reminder, just once.
A gentle vibration when you mark a bill as paid.
Other fixes and improvements.

blocks.text: This update makes dark mode available.

items: Dark mode is now available, choose a light, dark, or system theme.
Other fixes and improvements.

blocks.text: This update refines the Settings screen and adds more services to track.

items: More Settings polish, refined icon tiles and grouping.
Added another three services to the catalog by user request.
Other fixes and improvements.

title: Friendlier reminders and a refreshed Settings screen

blocks.text: This update makes bill reminders feel more personable and gives Settings a cleaner look.

items: Bill reminders now use friendlier, more varied messages with an emoji cue.
A refreshed Settings screen with colored icon tiles and clearer grouping.
Added three new services to the catalog by user request.
Other fixes and improvements.

blocks.text: This update brings Teiki to even more languages and refines how you customize your subscriptions.

items: Now available in 20 languages, adding Indonesian, Dutch, Polish, Romanian, Turkish, Vietnamese, Russian, Hindi, Portuguese (Portugal), and Chinese (Simplified and Traditional).
A cleaner, tighter color palette when customizing a subscription.
Other fixes and improvements.

blocks.text: This update brings Teiki to more languages and makes everyday tracking easier to keep accurate.

items: Now available in French, German, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese (Brazil), Japanese, and Korean.
Can't find a service? Request it or add it as a custom one right from search.
You can now record a past payment if you forgot to mark it paid at the time.
Paid subscriptions now show the next due date, and weekly or bi-weekly bills track their cycle more reliably.
Tile and Split card styles are now free for everyone.
Other fixes and improvements.

blocks.text: This update helps you keep your spending private and adds more services to track.

items: Tap the eye toggle beside your total to hide every amount and keep your spending private.
Added more banks and utility providers to the catalog.
Other fixes and improvements.

title: Clearer due dates and payment status

blocks.text: This update makes due dates and payment status easier to read at a glance.

items: Your subscription list now shows how soon each bill is due, like "2 weeks" or "1 month".
Paid status is clearer and shows exactly which billing cycle each payment covers.
Marking bills due on the 30th or 31st as paid now advances to the correct cycle.
Other fixes and improvements.

blocks.text: This update improves Calendar accuracy and everyday tracking.

items: Bills due on the 30th or 31st now appear on the correct dates.
You can now view History and Details from past and upcoming Calendar months.
Other fixes and improvements.

title: Settings, Calendar, and Subscription Tracking refinements

blocks.text: This update improves stability and refines the experience in Settings, Calendar, and Subscription Tracking.

items: Redesigned the Calendar into a dedicated page.
You can now add a subscription from the Calendar starting on the day you picked.
Refreshed the Filter, Sort, and Settings screens.

blocks.text: Teiki helps you track recurring bills, subscriptions, and payment reminders in one clean place.

Add upcoming bills, organize subscriptions with tags, review monthly totals, and get reminded before payments are due. Teiki makes it easier to see what renews next, how much you are spending, and which recurring payments need attention.

items: Track bills and subscriptions
View upcoming payment reminders
Organize subscriptions with tags
Review monthly totals
Customize subscription cards
Use privacy lock for extra protection
Sync with iCloud on supported devices

blocks.text: Designed for simple, private subscription tracking without clutter.
Teiki comes from the Japanese word for regular or periodic.
